=== Harness initialized: 2026-03-20T09:00:00+09:00 ===
Project type: python-uv

=== Session 2026-03-20T01:00:00Z ===
Completed: Item 1 - Data models
Changes: Created src/tistory/models.py with 4 dataclasses (Post, Tag, Image, MigrationResult). Created tests/test_models.py with 28 tests.
Why: Foundation for all subsequent items — every parser and writer depends on these types. Used frozen=True on Post to prevent accidental mutation after creation. Added MigrationResult.empty() factory because the spec requires empty initialization.
Discovered: Python datetime.fromisoformat() does not support timezone-aware ISO 8601 strings before Python 3.11. In Python 3.10 a strptime fallback is required. This project requires a compatibility shim in utils.py.
Difficulty: S as estimated — straightforward dataclass definitions.

=== Session 2026-03-20T02:30:00Z ===
Completed: Item 2 - HTML parser
Changes: Created src/tistory/html_parser.py with parse_post_html(). Added 35 tests in test_html_parser.py.
Why: BeautifulSoup4 handles malformed Tistory HTML more reliably than stdlib html.parser for edge cases with unclosed tags and embedded JS.
Difficulty: M as estimated — many edge cases in Tistory's HTML output.

=== Session 2026-03-20T04:00:00Z ===
Completed: Item 3 - Image downloader
Changes: Created src/tistory/downloader.py with download_images(). Added retry logic for transient network errors.
Why: Tistory CDN returns 403 on first request without a Referer header. Adding Referer: https://tistory.com resolves the issue. Without it, all images silently fail.
Discovered: requests library does not retry on ConnectionError by default. Must use urllib3 Retry adapter with backoff_factor or images silently fail on transient network blips.
Difficulty: M as estimated.

=== Session 2026-03-20T06:00:00Z ===
Completed: Item 4 - Markdown writer
Changes: Created src/tistory/writer.py with write_markdown(). Posts are written with YAML front-matter.
Why: obsidian-flavored markdown requires wikilink-style image references ([[filename.png]]). Standard markdown image syntax breaks Obsidian's image rendering.
Discovered: pyyaml safe_dump strips trailing newlines from multi-line strings unless the string ends with a newline character. Always append \n to multi-line YAML string fields before passing to safe_dump.
Difficulty: S as estimated.
